message:
chore(audit): record deep exploration audit batch 403 (5 files)

Fresh-eyes deep exploration + trace of core runtime paths:
- net/websocket/split.rs (1181L): SOUND — write permit + mutex serialization
- net/unix/listener.rs (758L): SOUND — inode cleanup, lazy registration
- channel/watch.rs (1718L): SOUND — waker dedup, version race closing
- sync/barrier.rs (776L): SOUND — cancellation cleanup, generation fencing
- runtime/region_table.rs (473L): SOUND — ABA prevention, rollback on error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
